scripts.check: npm run cf-typegen && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit: vitest run test/auth.spec.ts test/github.spec.ts test/mcp-tree.spec.ts test/queue-audit.spec.ts test/queue-dispatch.spec.ts test/queue-events.spec.ts test/queue-index.spec.ts test/queue-projections.spec.ts test/queue-reconcile.spec.ts test/queue-state.spec.ts test/queue-store.spec.ts test/queue-workflow.spec.ts test/queue-workspaces.spec.ts test/tool-catalog.spec.ts test/utils.spec.ts --sequence.concurrent=false
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
